scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep from current data/canonical/routes.jsonl, data/canonical/corridors.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and the available read-only validateRepo duplicate_global_identity issue artifact at data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl. Selected proposals must pass the requested guards and must not collapse route variants or partial-overlap corridors without source-backed lifecycle/same-service evidence.
scope.backlog_caveat: The user described a current 544-issue validation backlog, but the readable local issue artifact in scope, data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl, currently contains 121 issues: 117 duplicate_global_identity issues and 45 route/corridor duplicate_global_identity messages. No materialize, validate, export, or provider-backed command was run to regenerate the backlog.

validator_evidence: Global route records route_b46-limited-2012 and route_utica-ave-sbs share identity key route_b46.
proposed_aliases.reason: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity flags the two current route records on route_b46. This is a route-variant case, so it is proposed only because the canonical and source evidence explicitly describe a lifecycle from B46 Limited to B46 SBS: the alias is the B46 Limited/LTD service on Utica Avenue, while the target is the B46+/B46 SBS record, and source blocks say the B46 Limited was to be upgraded to B46 SBS and that existing B46 Limited stops would convert to SBS or local stops.

alias.description_sample: B46 Limited service to be upgraded to B46 SBS.

target.description_sample: Proposed B46 SBS replacing B46 Limited

source_evidence.quote: B46 LTD generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza
Build on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS.
Existing B46 Limited stops will either be converted to SBS stops or local stops
Fall 2014: Develop B46 SBS and B46 local service plan

proposal_guards: Every proposed alias and target was verified as a current record_id in data/canonical/routes.jsonl or data/canonical/corridors.jsonl.
No proposed alias is a current route/corridor merge alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed target is a current route/corridor merge alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed alias is a current route/corridor merge target in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Every alias and target pair is distinct.
No proposed pair is covered by a current route/corridor do-not-merge guard.
Route local/limited/SBS/express variants were excluded unless source evidence stated a lifecycle or same-service conversion.
Partial-overlap, adjacent, or similarly named corridor geography was excluded even when the validator shared a street-name key.
excluded_current_duplicate_classes: Excluded corridor_third-ave-36th-to-55th with corridor_third-ave-55th-to-57th because canonical limits identify adjacent Third Avenue project sections, not duplicate corridor records.

Excluded route_b46-local-limited-20110915 with route_b46-limited-2012 because the broader B46 local-and-limited record and the limited-stop variant should not be collapsed without an explicit same-record lifecycle target.

Excluded route_bx55-lga-2012 with route_bx55-2012 because the alias source is a participant-identified future LaGuardia access idea via the RFK Bridge, while the target is the existing Bx55/Webster Avenue service context.

Excluded route_q53-lga-2012 with route_q53-ltd-woodhaven-2014 because the alias source is a participant-identified future LaGuardia access idea from Rockaway Park, while the target is the existing Q53 Limited Woodhaven/Cross Bay service.
Excluded route/corridor duplicate rows where one or both ids are missing from current canonical JSONL because they have already been materialized away or are stale validation rows.
Excluded route/corridor rows where the candidate alias is already a merge alias, the target is a merge alias, or the alias is already a merge target.

command_evidence.purpose: Located the requested canonical, identity override, review-note, and validation issue artifacts without running materialize, validate, export, or provider-backed commands.

command_evidence.command: head -40 data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl; rg 'Global route records|Global corridor records' data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Read available validateRepo duplicate_global_identity issue rows for route/corridor candidate selection.

command_evidence.command: node <<'NODE' <read-only guard pass over routes.jsonl, corridors.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, and validation_issues.jsonl> NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Filtered candidate alias->target directions to pairs where both ids exist, alias is not a merge alias, target is not a merge alias, alias is not a merge target, alias != target, and no do-not-merge guard applies.

command_evidence.command: node <<'NODE' <read selected current route/corridor canonical records> NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Inspected canonical payloads, route variants, source ids, and merged field values for remaining candidate pairs.
Read local source blocks for B46 Limited/B46 SBS lifecycle evidence.

command_evidence.command: node <<'NODE' <read-only final guard/count check for route_b46-limited-2012 -> route_utica-ave-sbs> NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed the selected pair still passes the requested guards and has a current duplicate_global_identity validator row in the readable issue artifact.
